channel.title: Photos on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.
channel.description: Recent content in Photos on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.

item.title: People of GVRD
item.description:
I walk around Greater Vancouver and ask random strangers for permission to photograph them. There’s no real motive — just to force myself to engage more with my surroundings, talk to people, and hopefully share something interesting.

If you’re one of the people I met on these walks: thank you for being open to it, and for being part of this little experiment. If you have any objection to the use of your picture, email me and I’ll sort it out.
